stemHtml:
You have departed Brussels (EBBR) at 11:45Z to fly to Glasgow (EGPF). In the cruise at FL180 you receive the following message relating to an area the flight is expected to pass through:

“EGTT SIGMET 2 VALID 041000/041100 EGRR- EGTT LONDON FIR SEV MTW FCST WI N5300 W00130 - N5300 W00300 - N5500 W00200 FL070/200 STNR WKN”

What hazard can be expected?

options.a: You will not encounter mountain wave turbulence, as the SIGMET expires before your departure.
options.b: Mountain wave turbulence will still be encountered, even after the SIGMET expires.
options.c: You cannot be certain whether mountain wave turbulence will be present after 11:00Z.
options.d: The SIGMET only applies to aircraft flying below FL100, so it is not relevant at FL180.
